data.title: Litecoin's price at $54.06 eyes $58 breakout amid bearish trend. RSI at 45.98, MACD signals caution. (Read More)
data.description: The Litecoin (LTC) cryptocurrency is currently trading at $54.06, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 45.98. Technical analysis indicates a possible upswing towards the $58.17 resistance level. However, bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator advise caution for the short-term trajectory.

data.title: Iran is engaged in an information war with propaganda and disinformation to counter US and Israeli attacks on the internet.
data.description: A significant amount of propaganda and misinformation has been spread online to diminish backing for military actions carried out by the United States and Israel. This misleading content aims to manipulate public opinion and sway support away from these nations during their attacks.

data.title: 1970s oil crises caused panic with gas lines & prices quadrupling. Will Iran war have similar impact on world economy?
data.description: American consumers were alarmed by long gas lines and a fourfold increase in oil prices. This oil crisis had a major impact on global finance.

data.title: Tech executives in Silicon Valley are embracing small teams of just two: one person and artificial intelligence, as AI takes on more tasks.
data.description: With the increasing use of artificial intelligence in various tasks, tech executives are now forming teams as small as two members: one individual and an A.I. system. This trend reflects the growing reliance on A.I. in the business world.

data.title: Russian bakery faces survival amid 3,500% tax hike, showcasing economic crisis at Moscow's door.
data.description: A small business owner near Moscow is grappling with difficulties, shedding light on the potential crisis looming over Russia's economy, which has been severely impacted by the ongoing war. The situation underscores the challenges faced by businesses in the region and the uncertain economic future ahead.
